content_markdown:
The average albedo of glacier ice is 0.25.

What is $\frac{\text{power absorbed by glacier ice}}{\text{power reflected by glacier ice}}$?

diagram_metadata.description: No diagram present in the image.

vibe_explanation: Albedo ($\alpha$) is defined as the ratio of reflected power to incident power. Here, $\alpha = 0.25$, meaning 25% of the power is reflected. Since energy is conserved, the remaining 75% (or $1 - 0.25 = 0.75$) must be absorbed. The question asks for the ratio of absorbed power to reflected power, which is $0.75 / 0.25 = 3.0$.
